simple_math documentation¶

Add your content using reStructuredText syntax. See the reStructuredText documentation for details.

A collection of simple math operations.

Functions¶

simple_add(a,b) : Return the sum of a and b. simple_sub(a,b) : Return the difference of a and b. etc. etc. Say no more, say no more.

simple_math.poly_first(x, a0, a1)¶

Evaluate a first order polynomial.

Arguments: a0 - order 0 constant a1 - order 1 constant x - value of the variable

simple_math.poly_second(x, a0, a1, a2)¶

Evaluate a second order polynomial.

Dependences: poly_first(x, a0, a1)

Arguments: a0 - order 0 constant a1 - order 1 constant a2 - order 2 constant x - value of the variable

simple_math.simple_add(a, b)¶

Return the sum of a and b.

simple_math.simple_div(a, b)¶

Return the quotient of a and b.

simple_math.simple_mult(a, b)¶

Return the product of a and b.

simple_math.simple_sub(a, b)¶

Return the difference of a and b.
